plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: Collection of core .NET skills for handling common .NET coding tasks.

plugins.name: dotnet-ai
plugins.description: AI and ML skills for .NET: technology selection, LLM integration, agentic workflows, RAG pipelines, MCP, and classic ML with ML.NET.

plugins.name: dotnet-data
plugins.description: Skills for .NET data access and Entity Framework related tasks.

plugins.name: dotnet-diag
plugins.description: Skills for .NET performance investigations, debugging, and incident analysis.

plugins.name: dotnet-maui
plugins.description: Skills for .NET MAUI development: environment setup, diagnostics, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: dotnet-msbuild
plugins.description: Comprehensive MSBuild and .NET build skills: failure diagnosis, performance optimization, code quality, and modernization.

plugins.name: dotnet-nuget
plugins.description: NuGet and .NET package management: dependency management and modernization.

plugins.name: dotnet-template-engine
plugins.description: .NET Template Engine skills: template discovery, project scaffolding, and template authoring.

plugins.name: dotnet-test
plugins.description: Skills for running, diagnosing, and migrating .NET tests: test execution, filtering, platform detection, and MSTest workflows.

plugins.name: dotnet-upgrade
plugins.description: Skills for migrating and upgrading .NET projects across framework versions, language features, and compatibility targets.

plugins.name: experimental
plugins.description: Experimental .NET agent skills under active evaluation. These skills may change or be promoted to release.
